sampleTweets.text:
⚡️Prediction Markets are heating up on Solana

From integrated giants like #Jupiter to native leaders like #Hedgehog and a growing wave of specialized apps, the ecosystem is expanding fast across trading, governance, and hybrid infra.

Fast execution, low fees, and composability are turning #Solana into a hub for onchain forecasting.

Ecosystem snapshot 👇
🔸Integrated: @jup_predict
🔸Native: @HedgehogMarket
🔸Specialized: @intodotspace, @triadmarkets, @meleemarkets, @wormwtf, @totalistrading
🔸Futarchy: @MetaDAOProject
🔸Infra: @ODDSFi, @MonacoTrading

Who are we missing? 👀

BREAKING: We're partnering with @SolanaFndn to rebuild Solana's read layer from the ground up.

@anza_xyz and @jump_firedancer have done incredible work scaling execution and networking, but the read layer has stayed largely unchanged since genesis. It was built alongside the validator and never got its own architecture.

By 2026, that gap shows: slower access, expensive customisation, and growing limitations at scale. The teams closest to the problem built great tools behind closed doors because the read path was too deeply coupled to the validator to improve without massive effort.

It's time Solana's data access layer matched the ecosystem's needs, and we're proud to be the ones building it:

Big news: reads are moving out of Agave into two modular systems, independently scalable, in sync with the network tip, open-source and managed by @SolanaFndn:

- Accounts: an adaptive indexing engine that ingests, stores, and serves the exact account data your app needs at extremely low latency

- Ledger: full architecture to ingest, store, and serve the entire ledger faster and more efficiently in a columnar engine purpose-designed for how builders query data

Every infrastructure provider, builder, dApp, and institution benefits, with the biggest impact coming from what gets built on top.

Full architecture overview: https://t.co/yLMDZIoP9Z

More technical posts coming as we build through 2026, so make sure to follow us on X and subscribe to our blog.

reason: Perps / Trading cluster linked by [trading, upgrade, chart, update, solana]

sampleTweets.text:
Here is the full Bullet List of upgrades and more:

Infra and Backend:
• Upgrade bullet code for Celestia's V8 upgrade
• Upgrade frontend to use Pyth Lazer
• Migrate to PagerDuty for oncall alerting
• Isolated margin functionality merged to backend code, allowing users to assign a specific amount of capital for individual trade

Product and Frontend:
• Oracle chart upgraded to real-time streaming. The oracle price chart now streams live price updates continuously, so candles refresh automatically without any page interaction.
• 24-hour price changes powered by CoinGecko. Market price change data is now sourced from CoinGecko, updating every 60 seconds
• Automatic deposit recovery. If a bridge deposit was interrupted or left incomplete, the app will now detect it on startup and automatically finalize it for you.
• Animated Bullet loading spinner. The chart loading screen now displays the Bullet logo animation instead of the default spinner.
• Price chart gaps now shown accurately. When there is no trading activity during a candle interval, the chart now correctly displays an empty gap instead of connecting unrelated candles.
• Fix mid price in the order form. The mid price (used when clicking "Mid" in the order form) is now correctly rounded to the market's tick size, so the value you see is always a valid price for that market.
- Take Profit / Stop Loss edits now work correctly. Fixed an issue where editing a TP/SL order could fail when only one side had a trigger price set.

Proof of Solana OG. Receipts from 2021:

Back in 2021, I was sharing Excel sheets on Twitter with floor prices from nft collections.

I was living in Bali and had become an nft whale across all the first Solana OG collections. I probably only had 1k-4k followers at the time, and I was spending hours every single day building those sheets just to gain a slight edge in trading.

Everything was manua lmao. I had to collect data from different Solana marketplaces one by one.

There were no charts back then. No dashboards. No fancy analytics.

So every day, at the exact same time, I would log the numbers myself just to create consistent 24h data points.

The funny part is that only like 5-20 people were actively engaging with those posts.

I was pouring insane amounts of energy into my content with zero guarantee that anyone would see it, appreciate it, or care.

Now, looking back at my journey with 240k more followers, I finally understand why I had to go through all of that.

What a blessing, man. I was literally just a kid in this video.

I hope you guys understand that the efforts you make today can be incredibly meaningful, even if you can’t see the results yet.
